_note: Declarative invariant spec for the Cashio stablecoin (the reviewable artifact from skill/invariant-monitoring.md). The mint is the real mainnet CASH mint; the collateral-vault and crate-state PDAs are placeholders an operator fills from the program's IDL + getProgramAccounts (they are program-specific). run-invariant-surfpool.ts builds an equivalent spec over *synthetic* accounts so it can drive the breach with cheatcodes; this file is the mainnet-shaped form you would actually monitor with `tsx monitor.ts invariants.cashio.json` against a live/archive RPC.
